title: ObservedIdentity
description: A projection record of a security identity the control plane has OBSERVED (design §16.5.4): a distinct grantee seen via an access request, a catalogued version's author, an administrator grant, or an entitlement grant. Recorded so the control plane can offer a store-indexed, prefix-searchable typeahead of REAL identities to name as grantees (view/operate/administer), each resolving to its EXACT deployment-stamped sys: identity — so administrator/entitlement membership (exact set-equality) is never an inert or over-broad hand-typed rule. Holds only sys: identity tags (authorization metadata), never secrets, so it persists as plain JSON like every other entity. Keyed by (subjectKind, subjectValue); backends prefix-index subjectValue for typeahead and keyset-page the search.

subjectKind.description: The kind of grantee this identity names.

subjectValue.description: The grantee value as typed/searched (a subject id, tenant name, role name, or workflow id). Prefix-indexed for typeahead; together with subjectKind it is the record key.

label.description: An optional human-friendly display label (e.g. a person's display name), if one was observed.

identityTags.description: The full, EXACT deployment-stamped sys: identity this grantee resolves to (order-independent, compared as a set) — the identity a grant or administrator entry must name to match this principal. Empty denotes the unscoped (system) identity.

complete.description: Whether identityTags is the principal's WHOLE stamped identity (so an exact-equality grant will match), or a best-effort partial mapping (e.g. a single sys:sub tag for a person whose full identity the deployment also stamps with sys:tenant). A directory or self-identity sighting is complete; the policy's single-tag default for a finer-grained kind is not. The picker warns on an incomplete identity before granting (§17.2).

firstSeenAt.description: When this identity was first observed.

lastSeenAt.description: When this identity was most recently observed (bumped on each sighting; used to rank typeahead results).

provenance.description: Where this identity has been observed (e.g. accessRequest, catalogVersion, administrator, grant) — for audit and ranking.

GranteeKind.title: GranteeKind
GranteeKind.description: A well-known kind of grantee the deployment can resolve to a sys: identity (design §16.5.4).

SecurityTagInfo.title: ObservedSecurityTagInfo
SecurityTagInfo.description: A security label (KVP) forming part of an observed identity (§14.2).
